changeSet.author: shelf-storage-movement
changeSet.comment: Fix sample_storage_movement constraints to support 'general' location type. This allows shelf-level storage assignment where location_id can be NULL for general storage but location_type is 'general'.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE clinlims.sample_storage_movement DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_movement_has_location;

ALTER TABLE clinlims.sample_storage_movement ADD CONSTRAINT chk_movement_has_location CHECK ( (previous_location_id IS NOT NULL AND previous_location_type IS NOT NULL) OR (new_location_id IS NOT NULL AND new_location_type IS NOT NULL) OR (new_location_type = 'general') );
ALTER TABLE clinlims.sample_storage_movement DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_new_location_type_valid;
ALTER TABLE clinlims.sample_storage_movement DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_previous_location_type_valid;

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE clinlims.sample_storage_movement DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_movement_has_location;
ALTER TABLE clinlims.sample_storage_movement DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_new_location_type_valid;
ALTER TABLE clinlims.sample_storage_movement DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_previous_location_type_valid;
